name: Divine Temple of the Snake-Eye
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>蛇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>眼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>殿</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>でん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>スネークアイ
name_jp_tl: Divine Temple of the Snake Eye - Snake-Eye
desc: When this card is activated: You can place 1 "Snake-Eye" monster from your hand, Deck, or GY face-up in its owner's Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell. Level 1 FIRE monsters you control gain 1100 ATK. Once per turn, if your opponent Normal or Special Summons a monster(s) (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 Monster Card on the field treated as a Continuous Spell; Special Summon it to your field. You can only activate 1 "Divine Temple of the Snake-Eye" per turn.
eff: When this card is activated: You can place 1 "Snake-Eye" monster from your hand, Deck, or GY face-up in its owner's Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell. Level 1 FIRE monsters you control gain 1100 ATK. Once per turn, if your opponent Normal or Special Summons a monster(s) (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 Monster Card on the field treated as a Continuous Spell; Special Summon it to your field. You can only activate 1 "Divine Temple of the Snake-Eye" per turn.

action: Places cards from hand in Spell & Trap Zone
Places cards from your hand in your opponent's Spell & Trap Zone
Places cards from Deck in Spell & Trap Zone
Places cards from Graveyard in Spell & Trap Zone
mst: Treats monsters as Continuous Spell Cards
summoning: Special Summons from your Spell & Trap Zone
Special Summons from your opponent's Spell & Trap Zone to your field
